/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/smart_glasses.dir/main.cpp.o -o smart_glasses  ../agent/libagent_lib.a ../audio/libaudio_lib.a ../prediction/libprediction_lib.a ../perception/libperception_lib.a ../sensors/libsensors_lib.a ../autograd/libautograd_lib.a ../sim/libsim_lib.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd -lm ../sensors/libsensors_lib.a ../autograd/libautograd_lib.a -lm
